name: CUMULUS MEDIA INC
summary: Cumulus Media is an audio-first media company reaching approximately 250 million listeners monthly. It operates 400 owned-and-operated radio stations across 84 markets, distributes nationally-syndicated programming via Westwood One across 9,500+ affiliated stations, and runs the Cumulus Podcast Network. The company generates revenue through broadcast radio advertising, digital advertising (podcasting, streaming, digital marketing services), and other revenue including events and content licensing.

products.name: Westwood One
products.description: Largest audio network in America distributing syndicated sports, news, talk, and entertainment to 9,500+ affiliated stations.

products.name: Cumulus Podcast Network
products.description: Network of original personality-driven podcasts monetized through national and local ad sales teams.

products.name: Cumulus C-Suite
products.description: Digital marketing services portfolio including email marketing, geo-targeted display, video solutions, and search engine marketing.

products.name: Boost
products.description: Digital marketing suite offering website building, social media management, reputation management, listing management, and SEO.

products.name: Streaming Audio Network
products.description: One of the largest streaming audio advertising networks in the U.S., including internet simulcasts of owned and operated radio stations.

partnerships.description: Outsourced national spot advertising sales for Cumulus owned-and-operated stations in exchange for commission.
Exclusive radio broadcast partnership providing national reach and advertising opportunities.
Exclusive radio broadcast partnership enabling national and local advertising campaigns.
Content partnership for nationally-syndicated news programming distributed via Westwood One.
Content partnership for nationally-syndicated entertainment programming.
Content partnership for nationally-syndicated sports programming via Westwood One.
Content partnership for nationally-syndicated sports programming distributed via Westwood One.
